channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Stock Climbs as Robotaxi Expansion Reaches Miami
item.description: Tesla Shares Rise as Robotaxi Service Expands Into Miami

item.title: SpaceX-Tesla Merger Could Create Nearly $4 Trillion Giant
item.description: A potential Musk empire merger could make SpaceX-Tesla the world's fourth-largest company.

item.title: Tesla's Delivery Strength Forces Wall Street to Reassess
item.description: Baird and JPMorgan reaffirmed their views after second-quarter deliveries topped expectations.

item.title: Cathie Wood Doubles Down on Tesla and SoFi With Fresh Million-Dollar Buys
item.description: Cathie Wood Backs Tesla and SoFi With Fresh Bets After Key Catalysts

item.title: Tesla Wins More American-Made & Safety Awards
item.description: This is going to feel like old news for anyone who’s been following electric vehicles and Tesla for the past several years, but if you’re new to this industry, perhaps some of it will come as a shocker. Most American-Made Cars First of all, in the latest American-Made Index from Cars.com, ... [...

item.title: Tesla flexes how it will help the blind with Cybercab
item.description: Tesla brought its innovative Cybercab robotaxi to the National Federation of the Blind (NFB) Annual Convention in Austin, Texas, on July 3 at the JW Marriott Austin. The hands-on demonstration highlighted the vehicle’s thoughtful design for blind and visually impaired users , underscoring Tesla’s...

item.title: Tesla challenges startups to score a gig inside its most advanced European factory
item.description: Tesla has issued an open challenge to startups across Europe, inviting them to bring their best battery technology directly to the floor of Gigafactory Berlin. The program, called the JUNI x Tesla Battery Cell Giga Challenge , opened applications this month with a deadline of July 24, 2026, and i...

item.title: Hyundai’s electric SUVs are winning over buyers, and it’s easy to see why
item.description: The IONIQ 5 is one of the most popular EVs right now outside of Tesla, and now Hyundai’s three-row electric SUV is finding its niche.

item.title: Tesla Rises 6% on Robotaxi and Delivery Momentum, Rivian and Lucid Jump 7%, Nio Gains 5% in EV Sector Rally
item.description: Shares of Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) are up 6% in midday trading to $416.50, leading a broad electric-vehicle rebound after a rough stretch for the group. Rivian, Nio, and Lucid are all trading higher alongside Tesla stock, and autonomous-vehicle ETFs are joining the move. Tesla stock’s gain caps a vola...

item.title: This ETF Is Up Double Digits This Year Without Owning Tesla
item.description: An old-economy sector fund is quietly beating the market darlings this year, and it holds zero shares of the electric-vehicle giant everyone loves to argue about. The iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:ITA) has climbed 13.74% year to date and 32.48% over the trailing year, all while o...

item.title: Tesla: Only Priced For Bad News
Rivian vs Tesla: Which EV Stock Is the Better Buy Right Now?
item.description: These EV stocks recently gave their shareholders some good news, with deliveries coming in better than expected.

item.title: Tesla China Sales Hit New 2026 High With 25% Surge in June
item.description: Tesla China Sales Hit New 2026 High With 25% Surge in June

item.title: Tesla is doing in China what it couldn't do in the U.S.
item.description: China's EV market has become one of the most brutally competitive automotive environments on earth. Domestic brands are fast, aggressive on price, and deeply familiar with local consumer preferences. For a foreign automaker trying to hold ground there, the math gets harder every quarter.

item.title: Tesla sales rebound in Britain with Musk backlash in rear mirror
item.description: Tesla sales in Britain have rebounded sharply as a backlash against Elon Musk fades and petrol prices push more drivers to buy electric vehicles (EVs).

item.title: F vs. TSLA: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
item.description: F vs. TSLA: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

item.title: Will the 3-Row Tesla Model Y L Sell Well in the USA?
item.description: The first thing you see now when you go to the Tesla webpage for the Model Y is the new Model Y L Premium. This is the new three-row Model Y first launched in China. It is now being built and sold in the United States to try to boost ...

item.title: Tesla: Even The Bull Case Doesn't Justify This Absurd Valuation
Can Tesla Meet Musk's 2026 Unsupervised Robotaxi Target?
item.description: TSLA's Miami robotaxi launch expands its autonomous ride-hailing footprint to three states, but its 2026 unsupervised driving goal remains a long way off.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Expands To Miami As Slow Rollout Continues. Stock Ticks Up.
item.description: Miami marks the latest city to offer Tesla's robotaxis. However, the service's rollout remains slow.

item.title: Tesla driver caught asleep at 100 km/h — how monitoring failed
item.description: A Tesla driver was filmed apparently fast asleep behind the wheel at about 100 km/h on British Columbia’s Trans-Canada Highway on Sunday, with two sleeping children in the car. The obvious question is how Tesla’s driver monitoring — the very system meant to catch this — let it happen. The answer ...

item.title: Tesla Launches Robo Taxi In Miami. What It Means for the Stock.
item.description: The pace of expansion is one reason Tesla stock has fallen about 13% this year heading into Monday. Investors appear to be waiting for Tesla’s artificial intelligence efforts to yield material sales and earnings.

item.title: Tesla robotaxi service expands to Miami from Texas
item.description: Miami is the first market outside Texas and California where Tesla has launched its driverless ride-hailing service

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises as the Slow Robo-Taxi Rollout Heads to Miami
item.description: The pace of expansion is one reason Tesla stock has fallen about 13% this year heading into Monday. Investors appear to be waiting for Tesla’s artificial intelligence efforts to yield material sales and earnings.

item.title: The Investors Scrambling to Keep SpaceX - and Elon Musk - Out of Their Portfolios
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Christopher Bejnar has spent the last couple of months combing through the fine print of exchange-traded funds, emailing financial advisers and moving money into European stocks – all to keep SpaceX out of his $1 million portfolio.Most Read from BloombergOil, Gas Tankers Cross Horm...

item.title: Tesla's Solid Q2 Delivery Report Sent Elon Musk's Stock Down 6%. What Happened?
item.description: Seemingly good news didn't boost the stock as one might have expected. Just don't read too much into the market's response.

item.title: Tesla’s blowout quarter comes with a warning sign
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) finally gave investors the number they had been waiting for. The electric-vehicle maker produced a lot more automobiles than Wall Street expected in the second quarter, giving bulls a much-needed data point following a tough stretch for CEO Elon Musk’s company. But the stock market d...

item.title: TSLA Stock Rises Overnight: Analyst Sees Rebound This Week After EV Delivery Surge, But Calls Stock ‘Fully-Priced’
item.description: Analyst Gary Black said higher gas prices likely drove EV demand more than FSD/autonomy enthusiasm.

item.title: Why Retail Traders Couldn’t Take Their Eyes Off These Stocks Last Week: META, MU, BABA, TSLA, RKLB
item.description: Artificial intelligence, semiconductors, automotive and space technology dominated headlines during the week.

item.title: A More Than 80% Chance of a Tesla and SpaceX Merger? It Could Be a Game Changer.
item.description: The debate over a possible Tesla-SpaceX merger is getting harder to ignore.

item.title: Meta and Tesla Are Suddenly Worth the Same $1.48 Trillion. Which Stock Wins from Here?
item.description: A photo finish in market value -- and a chasm in everything underneath it.

item.title: Buying the Most Sold Vehicle in the World, the Tesla Model Y — What Are Your Options?
item.description: You’ve decided to buy the car that for the last few years has been the top sold model in the world, gas or electric, the Tesla Model Y. Tesla has factories in California (Fremont), China (Shanghai), Texas (Austin), and Germany (Berlin) that have been churning them out for the US, ... [continued...

item.title: This 2023 Model 3 Has Tesla’s Durable Battery. It Still Degraded
item.description: Its LFP pack had 90% health at 26,000 miles. That’s not a disaster, but it’s worse than the chemistry’s reputation suggests.

item.title: $4.1 Billion Deal Shows Why Ferrari and Tesla Are Ditching Copper for a Substitute
item.description: Substitution is one of the fundamental economic forces. If a product goes up in price, consumers have a direct incentive to switch to a cheaper substitute. While branding power dictates some price flexibility, such calculations are more straightforward for fungible...

item.title: Tesla vs BYD: Two Paths to EV Leadership, One Winner
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and BYD (OTC:BYDDF) sit at opposite poles of the electric vehicle world. Tesla just posted a sharp Q1 margin rebound while pouring cash into robotics and autonomy. BYD, the world’s largest new energy vehicle maker by volume, keeps flooding global markets with affordable EVs an...

item.title: Elon Musk Says Optimus Production Will Be 'Extremely Slow' in the Beginning: 'This is Not Like Making a Car'
item.description: Elon Musk pushed back Wednesday against speculation that Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ) is ahead of schedule on production of its Optimus V3 humanoid robot, saying the company’s initial ramp will be extremely slow because Tesla is building an entirely new manufacturing...

item.title: Tesla: AI Ambitions Can't Yet Offset Automotive Weakness
California vs. Elon Musk: Tesla Snubbed as New EV Incentives Boost Rivian, Lucid
item.description: The state of California is offering new incentives to first-time electric vehicle buyers, with legislation passed for purchases without an application needed. The new incentives could help Rivian Automotive and Lucid Group, while notably ignoring Tesla Inc. New First-Time Buyer...

item.title: Tesla's $1.4 trillion valuation rests on what happens next in one city
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is bringing its robotaxi pitch to another major U.S. city. The electric-vehicle maker said Friday its robotaxi service is now available in Miami, another move in Elon Musk’s effort to turn Tesla’s self-driving software into a broader ride-hailing business.

item.title: Down 35%, Is MercadoLibre Stock a Better Buy than SpaceX and the "Magnificent Seven" Stocks in July?
item.description: The largest-cap stocks may have limited upside.

item.title: "Big Short" Investor Michael Burry Is Now Betting Against Micron, Nvidia, and Tesla. Should You Be Worried?
item.description: The investor who called the housing crash just published his bets against three of the market's favorite stocks.

item.title: Cathie Wood buys $38.1 million of tumbling megacap stock
item.description: Cathie Wood, chief of Ark Investment Management, is known for buying “disruptive” tech stocks during market pullbacks. That’s what she just did, adding one of her highest-conviction investments, Tesla, as the stock fell more than 7% in a day. In 2025, the flagship Ark Innovation ETF gained 35.49%...

item.title: Rivian Just Raised Its 2026 Outlook While Tesla Stock Stumbled. Is the Electric Vehicle Underdog Finally a Buy?
item.description: The electric vehicle maker just raised its full-year outlook -- and the hard part starts now.

item.description: Ackman explains the core of his investment philosophy rooted in the wisdom of Warren Buffett.

item.title: BYD Beats Tesla — Again
item.description: One of our team members mentioned yesterday that BYD beat Tesla in BEV sales last quarter, and that we should have an article about it. I did publish such comparisons in the past, so it was definitely on me to get a new one out now. (To be honest, I ...
